queries.question: List the wines produced across the vineyards.
queries.sql: select vineyards.name , wines.name from Vineyards_Wines join Wines on Vineyards_Wines.wineId = Wines.wineId join Vineyards on Vineyards_Wines.vineyardId = Vineyards.vineyardId
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/agriculture#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/agriculture/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name ?name2 WHERE {
  ?vineyards_wines a :Vineyards_Wines .
  ?wines a :Wines .
  ?vineyards_wines p:hasWines ?wines .
  ?vineyards a :Vineyards .
  ?vineyards_wines p:hasVineyards ?vineyards .
  ?vineyards p:name ?name .
  ?wines p:name ?name2 .
}

queries.question: What name and variety of wine do we have at every vineyard?
queries.sql: SELECT Wines.name, Wines.variety  from Vineyards_Wines join Wines on Vineyards_Wines.wineId = Wines.wineId join Vineyards on Vineyards_Wines.vineyardId = Vineyards.vineyardId   GROUP BY Vineyards_Wines.wineId HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Vineyards_Wines.vineyardId) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Vineyards)

queries.question: What name and variety of wine do we have at every vineyard?
queries.sql: select vineyards.name , wines.name , wines.variety from Vineyards_Wines join Wines on Vineyards_Wines.wineId = Wines.wineId join Vineyards on Vineyards_Wines.vineyardId = Vineyards.vineyardId
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/agriculture#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/agriculture/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name ?name2 ?variety WHERE {
  ?vineyards_wines a :Vineyards_Wines .
  ?wines a :Wines .
  ?vineyards_wines p:hasWines ?wines .
  ?vineyards a :Vineyards .
  ?vineyards_wines p:hasVineyards ?vineyards .
  ?vineyards p:name ?name .
  ?wines p:name ?name2 .
  ?wines p:variety ?variety .
}

queries.question: What types of wines are typical for all vineyards?
queries.sql: SELECT Wines.variety  from Vineyards_Wines join Wines on Vineyards_Wines.wineId = Wines.wineId join Vineyards on Vineyards_Wines.vineyardId = Vineyards.vineyardId   GROUP BY Vineyards_Wines.wineId HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Vineyards_Wines.vineyardId) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Vineyards)

queries.question: For each vineyard, what is the variety of wines there
queries.sql: select vineyards.name , wines.variety from Vineyards_Wines join Wines on Vineyards_Wines.wineId = Wines.wineId join Vineyards on Vineyards_Wines.vineyardId = Vineyards.vineyardId

queries.sql: SELECT Wines.name  from Vineyards_Wines join Wines on Vineyards_Wines.wineId = Wines.wineId join Vineyards on Vineyards_Wines.vineyardId = Vineyards.vineyardId   GROUP BY Vineyards_Wines.wineId HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Vineyards_Wines.vineyardId) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Vineyards)
